probeModel.title: Probe model
probeModel.sourceAlias: CLI documentation alias (no official models command)
probeModel.hint: Resumes with this model and sends a tiny probe message during verification. Leave empty to use the target tool's default model. You can also append custom ids in ~/.resume-harness/models.json.
probeModel.customPlaceholder: Or enter a model id manually (overrides the selection above)

target.chooseHint: Choose the migration target tool (source session stays read-only and is not modified)
target.noTargets: No installed agents currently advertise migration write support.
target.notInstalled: Not detected, cannot be used as a target
target.installedMeta: Writes to the local {{tool}} session store

targetSession.empty: There is no session content to preview.

differences.title: Migration differences
differences.empty: No migration differences match this filter

reasons.tool_transformed: {{tool}} must be converted to a form supported by the target
reasons.tool_to_history: {{tool}} cannot be restored natively and was converted to history text
reasons.unknown_result_status: {{tool}} has an unknown result status and was converted to history text instead of being presented as a success
reasons.unsupported_result_status: The target cannot reliably represent the result status of {{tool}}, so it was converted to history text
reasons.tool_result_truncated: The source result of {{tool}} was truncated
reasons.unsupported_tool_fields: Some {{tool}} parameters cannot be represented by the target
reasons.default_fetch_prompt: {{tool}} was missing a prompt required by the target, so a default prompt was added
reasons.invalid_tool_input: {{tool}} has parameters that cannot be converted and was converted to history text
reasons.tool_unsupported: The target does not support {{tool}} and this content will be dropped
reasons.unsupported_image: The target session format does not support this image
reasons.unsupported_thinking: The target session format does not retain thinking content

confirm.title: Confirm migration
confirm.probeDesc: Performs a real resume on a temporary shadow session for verification (takes tens of seconds and consumes one tiny model call; cleaned up automatically, no messages appended to the migration artifact). When off, only structure validation is performed.
confirm.epilogue: Ferry will write to the target tool and re-read the artifact for structure validation (node count, parent-child relationships, and topology). {{probe}}If verification fails, it rolls back automatically and leaves nothing in the target.
confirm.probeEpilogue: Then runs the probe on a shadow copy.

result.doneBoth: Migration complete · structure validation and isolated probe passed
result.doneDesc: {{n}} messages written to {{tool}}, source session unchanged.
result.failTitle: Migration failed · verification did not pass
result.failDesc: Rolled back automatically, no artifacts kept in {{tool}}. Source session intact; you can retry or continue with a context summary.

history.empty: No migration records yet — click "Migrate…" in a session detail
history.probeNotRunDefault: Runtime probe not executed (off by default, can be enabled in settings)
history.rollbackDesc: Probe did not pass, Ferry rolled back automatically, no artifacts kept in {{tool}}. Source session intact; you can retry or continue with a context summary.
